query:
SELECT 'claims' AS tbl, id, 'incident_description' AS col, LEFT(incident_description,200) AS val FROM claims WHERE LOWER(incident_description) LIKE '%mandava%' OR LOWER(incident_description) LIKE '%zig%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'claims', id, 'incident_location', LEFT(incident_location,200) FROM claims WHERE LOWER(incident_location) LIKE '%mandava%' OR LOWER(incident_location) LIKE '%zig%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'historical_claims', id, 'incident_description', LEFT(incident_description,200) FROM historical_claims WHERE LOWER(incident_description) LIKE '%mandava%' OR LOWER(incident_description) LIKE '%zig%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'historical_claims', id, 'incident_location', LEFT(incident_location,200) FROM historical_claims WHERE LOWER(incident_location) LIKE '%mandava%' OR LOWER(incident_location) LIKE '%zig%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'historical_claims', id, 'claimant_name', LEFT(claimant_name,200) FROM historical_claims WHERE LOWER(claimant_name) LIKE '%mandava%'
LIMIT 20;
